name: friendly-neighborhood-lite
description: The LEAN themed edition of Friendly Neighborhood. Defensible differentiators: three-tier work model (responsibility = long-lived why/role/annual objective; mission = multi-session multi-handoff; patrol = single work unit); progressive distillation at every handoff; peer-reviewed knowledge vault pipeline; a two-track decision mechanic (hard signals → deterministic gate via tools/gate.py; soft signals → affirmative villain dissent + recorded judgment, no fake scores); and the symbiote (turn-limited self-escalation). Tiny roster only — spideys peter/miguel/noir, support jameson, villains carnage/mysterio/kingpin. No full cast, no per-agent screenplay, no themes, no phase-council tables.

default_persona.title: Default Spider-persona
default_persona.description: Which web-slinger drives the main session.

symbiote_max_turns.title: Symbiote turn cap
symbiote_max_turns.description: Max turns the high-power (miguel/opus) agent may run before the church bell forces a return to baseline.

dissent_passive.title: Passive villain dissent
dissent_passive.description: Run the villain dissent check automatically every turn (costs tokens) instead of on-demand only.

workspace_root.title: Workspace root override
workspace_root.description: Optional. Absolute path to the harness workspace. Leave empty to use the directory Claude Code was launched from.

max_concurrent_agents.title: Max concurrent subagents
max_concurrent_agents.description: Soft budget for how many subagents may run in flight at once — a cost/coordination guideline, not a safety cap. Also set during origin-story.
